name: compliance-specialist subagent: a recorded findings output validates against §2.3 shape {severity, rule_id?, file, line, finding, suggested_fix}
command: printf '[{"severity":"P1","rule_id":"g-compliance-001","file":"src/auth.ts","line":42,"finding":"PII logged without redaction","suggested_fix":"wrap with redact()"}]' > findings.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-subagent-findings.sh" "$PWD/findings.json" && echo ok 1>&2
